sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons_test (id UInt32, shape Polygon) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, wkt(polygonsIntersectionCartesian(shape, (SELECT shape FROM polygons_test WHERE id = 2))) AS intersection FROM polygons_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE polygons_test SET shape = polygonsFromText('POLYGON((0 0, 2 0, 2 2, 0 2, 0 0))') WHERE id = 1;
